What you've already built

Your data is the foundation
everything gets built on.

After 18 months working together, we know your numbers better than most. Here's what the full picture looks like — and what becomes possible when we build the right infrastructure around it.

$766K
Amazon Revenue YTD
Your top category: Toys & Games — and a track record of turning recommendations into purchases at scale
$1.75M
Walmart Affiliate Sales
One of the highest conversion rates we've seen from any creator — your audience acts when you recommend something
474K
URLGenius Clicks
1,347 active links already tracked — the foundation we upgrade into intelligent smart links that always earn more

Your audience doesn't browse — they buy. When you recommend something, they act on it. That conversion behavior is rare, and it's what makes everything in this proposal worth building. We're not starting from scratch — we're building infrastructure around something that's already working.

Your 1,347 URLGenius links become the foundation of a smart link system that automatically routes every click to the highest-earning retailer — so you earn more from the same traffic you're already sending, with no extra work.

And because we know your voice, your top products, and what your community responds to after working together, the AI agent we build won't sound generic. It'll sound like Steph — which is exactly why your audience will trust it.

What this partnership unlocks
Revenue that keeps earning between posts.
Right now, your earnings are tied to how often you post. This builds the layer underneath — an AI agent, a smart link network, a mobile storefront, and brand campaigns — so Mommy & Me earns around the clock, not just when you hit publish.
As a founding partner, you get
First access to new features Input on platform direction Referral partner upside Locked-in founding rate
Four Things We Build Together

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Each piece solves a specific gap in your current setup. Together they turn Mommy & Me into a compounding commerce platform — not just a creator with affiliate links.

A
Your Audience App
A mobile home your community downloads and keeps
A branded app for the Mommy & Me community — curated shopping guides by category, giveaways and contests that drive engagement, a community feed, and every product recommendation you've ever made, organized and searchable. Not a link-in-bio page. A real loyalty platform your audience returns to between posts.
B
AI Shopping Agent
Steph's voice. Your best data. 24/7.
Built from your real products, your real recommendations, and Steph's actual voice. When someone asks "what's the best lunch box for kindergarten?" — it answers the way Steph would, with the right link, automatically sent to whichever retailer earns the most for that product. It works around the clock — even when you're not posting.
C
Team Command Center
One app for everything your team does every day
Post Builder writes deal content in Steph's voice in seconds — pick your products, choose a format, and it's ready to copy and post. Collage Creator assembles multi-product images with all your affiliate links already filled in. One dashboard shows what's earning most across every retailer. No more hunting for links or switching between tabs.
D
New Revenue Paths
Revenue that doesn't stop when you stop posting
This is where the growth ceiling gets removed. Two new streams built on top of what you already earn — neither touches your organic income.
Brand-Funded Media Buying
Brands pay to amplify your proven content — posts that already showed strong clicks and conversions. Your $1 Walmart clearance post hitting 158K views is the exact data that gets a brand to fund amplification. We bring the relationships, manage the spend, and you earn a 70% revenue share on every campaign.
New Audience Channels
Every day, thousands of moms ask "what's the best ___?" on Reddit, parenting forums, and Facebook Groups — high-intent, ready to purchase, just not your followers yet. We build the system to find them and answer in Steph's voice with your affiliate links. 500M+ monthly Reddit users. Your niche is one of the most active.

Partnership Structure

You keep what's yours.
We earn what we create.

One principle drives everything: we only make money when we generate something genuinely new for you. Your organic earnings — every post, every LTK link, everything you've already built — are 100% yours and never touched.

Full-Service Agency
$3,500/mo
Everything below is included · 90 days · $10,500 total
  • Your branded audience app — built, launched, and managed for you
  • AI shopping agent trained in Steph's voice, live for your community 24/7
  • Smart links across all your affiliate accounts, automatically routing to the highest-earning retailer
  • Post Builder and Collage Creator — your team's daily content tools
  • Brand outreach, deal negotiations, and campaign management end-to-end
  • Weekly performance reporting — what's earning, what's growing, what's next
  • URLGenius integration — your 1,347 links upgraded to intelligent smart links
Success Share
30%
Only on new revenue we generate together
How this works
During the 90-day setup and testing period, we're focused on building — not billing. The 30% only applies to new revenue streams that come live and produce results. If we don't generate it, we don't earn from it. Your organic income is always 100% yours.
New revenue paths we build together
AI Shopping Agent
Steph's voice answering product questions 24/7 — every answer includes your best affiliate link.
Reddit & New Audiences
Reach moms actively asking "what should I buy?" outside your existing following — in your voice.
Paid Content Boosting
Brands fund amplification of your best-performing posts. You earn 70% of every campaign we bring in.
Mobile Shoppable Collages
Multi-product posts with smart links built in — one tap to buy, automatically routed to the best retailer.
Highest-Commission Routing
Every URLGenius link upgraded to route automatically to whichever retailer pays most — Walmart, Amazon, or others.
AI-Curated Mobile Storefront
A living, searchable home for every recommendation you've ever made — organized by category, updated automatically.
The math, plainly
We secure a $10,000 brand campaign → You receive $7,000 + We receive $3,000
AI agent generates $5,000 in commissions → You receive $3,500 + We receive $1,500
No new revenue generated this month → You pay retainer only. We earn nothing beyond that.
We secure a $10,000 brand campaign
You receive $7,000
We receive $3,000
AI agent generates $5,000 in commissions
You receive $3,500
We receive $1,500
No new revenue generated this month
You pay retainer only. We earn nothing beyond that.

The 30% applies to any revenue that flows through EchoTribe-built tools — the app, the AI agent, smart links, brand campaigns. If a follower finds you through your organic post and then browses your storefront or clicks an AI recommendation, that conversion happened through infrastructure we built and manage. That's what the share covers. Your direct affiliate links in your posts — Amazon, Walmart, LTK — stay 100% yours, as always.

90-Day Roadmap

What happens,
week by week.

The first 90 days build and prove the model — $10K in new revenue while the infrastructure goes live. After that it compounds: $25K/month by Q3, $45K in October, and $80K/month in November and December when your audience is at peak buying intent.

90d
$10K
First 90 Days
Total new revenue while infrastructure is built and first campaigns launch
Q3
$25K/mo
July – September
All systems live, brand campaigns converting, AI agent active
Oct
$45K/mo
October
Full momentum, multiple brand campaigns, audience channels scaling
Q4
$80K/mo
Nov & Dec
Peak season. Your 70% share: $56K/mo on top of all organic earnings
Weeks 1–2
We Set Everything Up
  • Your app, smart links, and AI agent built and ready to go
  • AI trained in Steph's voice so it sounds like you, not a robot
  • All your affiliate accounts connected in one place
  • Brand outreach list built — who to pitch, what to lead with
Weeks 3–4
We Go Live
  • Your audience app and AI agent open to the Mommy & Me community
  • Post Builder and Collage Creator ready for your team to use daily
  • First brand conversations started — Walmart, Ulta, and others
  • You start seeing what your audience engages with most
Weeks 5–8
We Test & Earn
  • First paid brand campaigns live — your best content, amplified
  • New audiences reached outside your existing following
  • You can see every new revenue stream in one dashboard
  • We refine what's working and cut what isn't
Weeks 9–12
We Scale
  • More brand deals, more amplification on what's proven
  • Q4 holiday campaigns secured while other creators are still planning
  • Full review together — numbers on the table, next steps clear
  • You keep everything we built, whatever you decide
Exit protection built in
Day 30 checkpoint. Day 90 review. You keep everything either way.
Day 30: If it's clearly not gaining traction, you can exit with 2 weeks' notice.
Day 90: We review the numbers together and decide — continue, expand, or part ways. You keep all infrastructure we built regardless of outcome.
Always: Your organic earnings are 100% yours and never touched.
Ready When You Are

Your audience already
buys. Let's build the
system around that.

Your Walmart CVR is 8× the industry average. Your audience converts when you show them the right product. The only question is how much of that conversion is being captured — and how much is slipping through.

One question to start the conversation

Which of the four pieces matters most to Mommy & Me right now? The audience app and community features, the AI shopping agent, the team tools that save hours every week, or the brand partnerships and new revenue paths — we can build the engagement around whatever creates the most immediate value.

The 90-day retainer is $10,500 total. Day 30 is your first real checkpoint — if it's not working, you walk away. If Q4 performs at target, your 70% share is $56K/month in new revenue on top of everything you're already earning from your posts.
